message.content: make a script or somthing that turns of my computer at 9:30 pm during weekdays except friday

content.text: I'll add a systemd timer + service to `common.nix` that shuts down at 21:30 on Mon-Thu.

content.content: The file /home/jofre/.dotfiles/config/nix/machines/common.nix has been updated successfully.

lines: +    description = "Automatic shutdown at 9:30 PM (weekdays except Friday)";

content.text:
Done. This adds a systemd timer that runs `shutdown now` at 21:30 on Monday through Thursday. Apply it with:

```bash
sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake /home/jofre/.dotfiles/config/nix/.#$(hostname)
```

You can verify the timer is active after rebuild with:

```bash
systemctl list-timers auto-shutdown
```

lastPrompt: make a script or somthing that turns of my computer at 9:30 pm during weekdays except friday
